title: Fission-AI/OpenSpec
friendlyTitle: OpenSpec: clearer plans for AI coding assistants
summary: OpenSpec is a spec-driven development framework for AI coding assistants. It creates structured proposals, specs, designs, and task lists so humans and AI agents agree on requirements before implementation.
friendlySummary: OpenSpec helps you write a clear plan before an AI coding assistant starts changing code.
whyItMatters: Developers can use OpenSpec to make AI coding sessions less chaotic by moving from loose chat instructions to versioned change folders, validation steps, and repeatable slash-command workflows.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can reduce messy AI coding work by keeping requirements, design notes, and tasks organized.
